mnemonic: victory [ви'ктори] победа - Водопад (Виктори-я) в честь победы назван.

examples.eng: Victory Day
That was a famous victory.
Beckham led his team to victory.
examples.ru: Бекхэм привёл свою команду к победе.

examples.eng: He savours his victory.
It was a gratifying victory.
Napoleon's military victories
She guided her team to victory.
examples.ru: Она привела свою команду к победе.

examples.eng: Jordan led his team to victory.
examples.ru: Джордан привёл свою команду к победе.

examples.eng: Smith's goal sealed the victory.
The obverse of victory is defeat.
The home run cinched the victory.
His home run clinched the victory.
A military victory is unattainable.
It was a surprisingly easy victory.
They register an impressive victory.
He was their best hope for a victory.
examples.ru: Он был их главной надеждой на победу.

examples.eng: The general led the troops to victory.
The trade unions have scented victory.
They won, but it was a hollow victory.
examples.ru: Они победили, но эта победа оказалась пирровой.

examples.eng: The team is still savoring its victory.
examples.ru: Команда всё ещё наслаждается своей победой.

examples.eng: It was a decisive victory for the army.
examples.ru: Для армии это была окончательная победа.

examples.eng: Hang out the flag, the victory is ours!
He notched his fifth victory this year.
examples.ru: Он отметил свою пятую победу в этом году.

examples.eng: He longed to lead his men on to victory.
examples.ru: Он мечтал повести свои войска к победе.

examples.eng: Our team are crowing over their victory.
Rogers had victory firmly in his sights.
She praised him sincerely for his victory.
examples.ru: Она искренне похвалила его за победу.

examples.eng: He basked in the afterglow of his victory.
examples.ru: Он грелся в лучах своей победы.

examples.eng: The team's victory has heartened its fans.
The result was a narrow victory for Smith.
examples.ru: В результате Смит одержал нелёгкую победу.
